input.background: Determine the sample size required for conducting a two-sided test of H0: p1=p2 with an equal number of subjects in each group, α=0.05 (z1-(.05 / 2)=1.96), 1-β=0.90 (z.90=1.282), p1=0.10, and p2=0.05.
input.question: Determine the sample size required for conducting a two-sided test of H0: p1=p2 with an equal number of subjects in each group.

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量

alpha.description: Significance level for the hypothesis test.

z_alpha/2.description: Z-score corresponding to the significance level alpha/2.

power.description: Power of the test, which is 1 minus the Type II error rate (beta).

z_beta.description: Z-score corresponding to the power of the test.
